_meta.description: Canonical URL authority for all Math Class 678 products (skill sheets, bundles, warm-ups, posters, word wall, interactive notebooks, readiness checks, I Can posters, free resources). Every Pinterest pin and every PX back-matter card pulls from here first.
_meta.source: Rebuilt S348 from MathClass678_Deliverable_Link_Map.xlsx (Master Index: 774 live deliverables) + cross-checked against MathClass678_TPT_Link_Tracker_6-19.xlsx. Every tpt_url below was extracted from the workbook's live cell hyperlinks (not hand-typed), so these are ground truth as of the source file's export.
_meta.destination_doctrine: TPT URLs are used throughout this rebuild. The source workbook's section notes mark mathclass678.com site pages as 'proposed' (not yet live) for word_wall, warmups, posters_anchor_charts, interactive_notebooks, readiness_checks, and i_can_target_posters — only skill_sheets/bundles/free_resources had live site pages in the prior version of this file. When those proposed site pages go live, swap the relevant tpt_url values for site URLs and note the change here.
_meta.qa_notes: 3 genuine duplicate rows flagged in the source workbook's QA & Flags tab were dropped during rebuild: FREE-006, WW-012, WW-025 (each a same-URL duplicate of another row in its own family). 10 intentional cross-listed freebies (e.g. Combining Like Terms appearing in both Skill Sheets and Free Resources) were kept once in each of their listed categories - that's expected, not an error.
_meta.algebra_1_coverage: Confirmed via full re-scan of all 9 catalog sections: Algebra 1 has ZERO skill sheets, bundles, posters, interactive notebooks, or free resources anywhere in the 774-item catalog. It DOES have 108 Word Wall vocabulary cards, 5 Warm-Ups (4 quarterly + 1 year bundle), 1 Readiness Check, and 1 I Can Target Posters set - none of which are free. The Middle School Math Word Wall (FREE-019, grades 6-8, in free_resources) remains the only free resource that reasonably covers an Algebra 1 classroom.
